description: Counterparty proposes its home-state law and litigation venue (courts, not arbitration). This is a listed acceptable_variation in the governing-law-and-venue topic (negotiable per playbook rationale) and must ACCEPT without triggering 'no-counterparty-home-arbitration', which only targets mandatory/binding *arbitration* clauses, not ordinary court venue selection.

must_not_flag.reason: Court-venue selection language is a listed acceptable_variation and contains neither 'mandatory arbitration' nor 'binding arbitration'; must not fire.

planted_variation.inserted_hunk: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Institution's home state, and venue for any dispute shall lie in the state or federal courts located in that state.
planted_variation.notes: Matches acceptable_variation 'institution's home state law and venue'; ordinary court-venue language, not arbitration.

detector_expectation.rationale: Hunk contains neither trigger_term 'mandatory arbitration' nor 'binding arbitration'.

authorship_note: AFK-drafted per issue #183 (owner-approved synthetic scaffold, 2026-07-10): fully invented, no real-world contract text, no de-identification required. Marked synthetic and pending GC sign-off; not production-qualified until Legal/GC reviews and approves.
